top_signals.title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
top_signals.summary: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: The season finale economy: Why we undervalue the Premier League
top_signals.summary: With one round of Premier League fixtures remaining, the season finale is not approaching, it is here. Title races (usually) tighten, relegation battles become existential, and the casual viewer becomes a committed one. For fans, it is the most emotionally charged period of the year. For brands, it should be one of the most valuable [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
